public void writeToStream(List<Challenge> list,
                          OutputStream out)

Throws:
ParserConfigurationException

saveChallenge

public void saveChallenge(Challenge challenge,
                          Document document,
                          Node parentNode)
Save a Challenge to XML. This will append the given Challenge to the node that is passed in.

Parameters:
challenge - The challenge to save
document - The overall document being written to
parentNode - The node that this challenge should be appended to
